workflow_name: Customer Inquiry Thread -> Response + Pipeline Note
user_message: Just got this from Robert Foster at Quantum Analytics -- I need help figuring out account health. The customer escalated this morning.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Robert Foster <robert.foster@quantumanaly.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-26 11:39 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Quantum Analytics account health

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with account health. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Robert Foster <robert.foster@quantumanaly.com>
Date: 2024-01-23 14:15 EST
Subject: Follow-up: account health Review

Just checking in on the account health proposal. Our Head of Digital is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Quantum Analytics: there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us

handoffs.condition: MSX update warranted from thread content

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF33-G trap (Draft response longer than thread warrants); produces complete Thread analysis, draft response, waiting-on-whom assessment, MSX pipeline note proposal (if warrante
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF33-G failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF33-G failure mode (Draft response longer than thread warrants)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct account health decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF33-G -- Draft response longer than thread warrants
